binding_reason: Signed friendly all-cash C$44 Zijin takeover, every approval secured EXCEPT one sovereign gate (China NDRC), against a mutual-extension-only hard 2026-07-29 outside date 37 days out; ~21% gross spread to ~$31 USD with a hard gold-ounce-backed ~$23 floor (-10%), ~2x defined-risk. The load-bearing catalyst ALREADY FIRED AND FAILED — the FDA issued a CRL on 2026-01-30. The board's '2026-09-30 hard date' is merely the guided NDA RESUBMISSION window, not an FDA decision; the true approval/CRL is two gates out and undated (~Q1-2027). Skeptic CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, cap 3 (~60), status SOFT_EXTENDED. Real, funded, differentiated second-attempt asymmetry (narrow fixable CRL, revenue-backed $2.75 floor), but undated and not imminent — watchlist for the resubmission acceptance + new PDUFA assignment, which converts it back to a dated binary worth sizing.

BBP-418 PDUFA hard-dated 2026-11-27 sits on a POSITIVE Phase 3 FORTIFY (p<0.0001), Priority Review, NO AdCom — an approval-given-positive-data gate (~0.85), not a coin-flip; ~$67 vs ~$105 target against a FRANCHISE-backed ~$58 floor ($940M cash + already-approved acoramidis ramping to breakeven, $500M buyback bid). ~4:1 with a real, non-zero downside. Removal of BHC's ~87-88% overhang via full separation is a REAL ~21% down / ~79% up asymmetry on a good growing $5.1B franchise, but the catalyst is SOFT_EXTENDED and the Skeptic capped at 35: the fast SALE path formally ended Feb-2025, and the remaining spin has NO record date, NO outside date, NO executed agreement — gated on a BHC leverage-ratio test the parent (~$20B+ debt, ~$10B due 2027) can barely pass plus litigation. Undated, parent-gated, third-party binary; best bought on a BHC-distress flush below the floor, not chased here.

Gedatolisib PDUFA 2026-07-17 (25 days out), Priority Review + RTOR, on a drug already de-risked by a positive pivotal cohort; the Skeptic's load-bearing correction is FAVORABLE — the wild-type cohort (the NDA basis) is the STRONGER arm (76%/67% risk reduction vs mutant 50%/49%), which raises approval odds, lifting the cap to 75. Live ~$88.55 vs ~$153 target vs a soft ~$60 fundamental floor, ~2.25:1. Pinned just under the cap; floor is a bear intrinsic value (not an arb backstop) that can overshoot below $60 on a CRL.

Company-run LS&H divestiture-plus-deleveraging re-rate (NOT the 'activist process' the board labeled — the May-14-2026 AGM re-elected all 10 directors cleanly). Skeptic capped at 35, status SOFT_EXTENDED: management explicitly disclaimed any timeline and any assurance of a transaction, no signed SPA exists, and the ~$1.42 floor is leverage-SOFT (FCF/credit-dependent, not cash/contract-backed) on a -4.0%-revenue, ERODING-moat base with a MATERIAL AI-displacement secular threat. DURAVYU Phase 3 LUGANO wet-AMD topline, fully enrolled, NON-INFERIORITY bar (lower hurdle), three consecutive positive DSMC reads, dated 'beginning Aug-2026'; live ~$13 vs $37.50 win vs a $223M-cash-backed $5.50 floor (funded into late-2027, no dilution gun), ~3.25:1.
